01

About & Skills

I'm a Marketing graduate from UBC Sauder School of Business (November 2025) with a competitive mindset and a passion for real estate and entrepreneurship. I bring proven results across outbound sales, event marketing, brand building, and community leadership.

My experience spans cold outreach & lead qualification at Oakfield Realty, market research reports at Cushman & Wakefield, apparel brand launches and vendor negotiations at Alpha Delta Phi, and elected community leadership as President of UBC Marine Drive Building 1 for 300+ residents.

I leverage AI tools daily — ChatGPT, Claude AI, and Google Gemini — to accelerate design, sharpen strategy, and amplify output quality. Proficient in Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, ZoomInfo, and Privyr. Canadian work permit holder — actively seeking Marketing, Sales, and Real Estate roles. Open to Dubai.

Alpha Delta Phi  ·  Event Marketing

Experts Only — Valentine's Day 2026

Bold editorial event flyer for ADP's Valentine's Day party at Fraternity Village. Dramatic architecture photography with oversized lime-green typography — creating an instantly recognisable visual identity that drove attendance.

Published Writing

✍️   UBC Alumni Magazine  ·  Published Article

A Night for the Books

Don Toliver at Block Party · 2024

Published in The University of British Columbia Magazine — Siddhant's piece captures the electric atmosphere of Don Toliver's 2024 campus show with vivid first-person storytelling and cultural fluency that resonates with a student audience.

"The energy in the crowd was insane, the bass felt like it was shaking the Nest off its foundation, and we were just vibing the whole time."

The article demonstrates the same skill set he brings to brand storytelling and marketing campaigns — research-backed, audience-aware, and designed to connect.
